articles.title: Prediction Markets Are Booming, but I'd Rather Bet on These 3 AI Stocks
articles.summary: Someone's making the case that AI stocks offer better returns than the current prediction market gold rush. Smart money might be right since AI companies are actually building the infrastructure that powers modern prediction platforms, while most betting markets just shuffle money around without creating real value.

articles.title: Women Wanted: Kalshi Pushes to Expand Far Beyond Sport Bets
articles.summary: Kalshi is actively recruiting women to diversify its user base beyond the male-dominated sports betting crowd that currently drives most prediction market activity. This demographic shift could unlock massive growth potential since women represent an untapped market segment that might gravitate toward political, economic, or social prediction markets rather than traditional sports wagers.

articles.title: Trump is the GOAT in swaying GOP races — and prediction markets say he’ll decide Texas this way
articles.summary: Trump's endorsement track record in Republican primaries has been nearly flawless, and prediction markets are betting he'll swing the Texas GOP races decisively in favor of his picks. When the most successful kingmaker in modern politics weighs in on contested primaries, smart money follows his lead because his backing has become the single strongest predictor of Republican primary outcomes.

articles.title: Kalshi Sent Bizarre Message to Underage Streamer
articles.summary: Prediction market platform Kalshi apparently sent some kind of inappropriate or strange communication to a minor who streams online. This adds regulatory heat to a company already fighting Washington over election betting, giving ammunition to critics who want stricter oversight of prediction markets.

articles.title: The Bettors on Polymarket Don't Think Bitcoin Will Hit $150,000 in March. Here's What I Think.
articles.summary: Polymarket traders are betting against Bitcoin reaching $150,000 by March, suggesting most view the crypto's recent rally as overextended. The market's skepticism creates a clear contrarian setup where either the crowd gets validated or someone makes serious money fading the consensus.

articles.title: The Multibillion-dollar shift turning prediction markets into a professional hedging tool
articles.summary: Wall Street is discovering that prediction markets aren't just gambling platforms but sophisticated hedging instruments worth billions in risk management. This institutional money flood will dramatically increase market liquidity and accuracy, but it also means retail bettors are now competing against professionals with deeper pockets and better models.

articles.title: Insider Trading Is Going to Get People Killed
articles.summary: Stock traders are increasingly using non-public information from defense contractors and government sources to bet on geopolitical events, turning classified intel into market alpha. When prediction markets start pricing in military strikes or diplomatic moves before they happen, governments will crack down hard on both the traders and the platforms that enable them.

articles.title: Exclusive | Kalshi and Polymarket Are Each Eyeing Roughly $20 Billion Valuations
articles.summary: Kalshi and Polymarket are both reportedly seeking valuations around $20 billion as they compete for dominance in the prediction markets space. These sky-high valuations signal that institutional investors now view prediction markets as a legitimate financial infrastructure play, not just a niche betting product.

articles.title: Free Press Opinion: Prediction markets shouldn’t be so easy to play
articles.summary: A Free Press op-ed argues that prediction markets have become too accessible and user-friendly for the average person to participate in. The piece likely warns that easier entry creates more noise from uninformed traders, potentially undermining the markets' core value as accurate forecasting tools.

articles.title: Popular prediction markets take heat from lawmakers
articles.summary: Congressional lawmakers are ramping up scrutiny of major prediction markets, likely targeting platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi over regulatory concerns. The political pressure could trigger new restrictions or force these platforms to drastically change how they operate, potentially limiting what Americans can bet on.

articles.title: The prediction market backlash has arrived
articles.summary: Critics are finally pushing back hard against prediction markets after years of hype and mainstream adoption. The timing couldn't be worse for platforms trying to go legit, as regulatory scrutiny and public skepticism could kill the momentum that's been building since 2020.

articles.title: $100K Polymarket Winner Wagers on US Forces Entering Iran
articles.summary: A Polymarket trader who made $100K on previous bets is now wagering that US military forces will enter Iran. The bet signals either insider confidence in escalating Middle East tensions or a high-stakes gamble that could move markets if other whales follow suit.
